name: CLX - MGA Insurance E-Signature Orchestrator v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Sends compliance_disclosures (vertical_id='insurance') for e-signature via Zoho Sign. For each disclosure_id: creates a Zoho Sign request, persists envelope_id back to compliance_disclosures.esignature_id, sends signing link via lead's email (Zoho Sign also emails the recipient by default — we send our own intro for branding). All vertical-scoped.

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $json;
return ctx.disclosure_ids.map(function (id) { return { json: { disclosure_id: id, client_email: ctx.client_email, client_name: ctx.client_name } }; });

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: { request_name: 'Crystallux Insurance ' + $json.disclosure_type + ' for ' + $json.client_name, actions: [ { recipient_name: $json.client_name, recipient_email: $json.client_email, action_type: 'SIGN', signing_order: 1, role: 'Recipient', verify_recipient: false } ], notes: 'Crystallux Insurance disclosure - regulatory requirement under FSRA / PIPEDA / CASL.', expiration_days: 30 } }) }}

nodes.name: Zoho Sign Create Request
nodes.notes: Zoho Sign v1 API. ZOHO_SIGN_TOKEN is the OAuth access token (Mary refreshes via Zoho's OAuth flow — Phase 5b adds an automated refresh workflow). The request creates an envelope; Mary's account email gets the signing-link broadcast. We persist envelope id back to compliance_disclosures and the callback workflow (A3.3) marks signed when Zoho fires request_completed.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'lead-meeting-booked', to: $('Parse Zoho Response').item.json.client_email, vars: { first_name: $('Parse Zoho Response').item.json.client_name, message: 'Please review and sign your Crystallux Insurance ' + $('Parse Zoho Response').item.json.disclosure_type.replace(/_/g, ' ') + ' document. The signing link from Zoho Sign should arrive in your inbox shortly.', landing_url: $('Parse Zoho Response').item.json.signing_url || 'https://app.crystallux.org' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'disclosure_presented', client_id: $('Parse Zoho Response').item.json.client_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { disclosure_id: $('Parse Zoho Response').item.json.disclosure_id, disclosure_type: $('Parse Zoho Response').item.json.disclosure_type, esignature_provider: 'zoho_sign', envelope_id: $('Parse Zoho Response').item.json.envelope_id }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const sent = $('Parse Zoho Response').all().map(function (i) { return { disclosure_id: i.json.disclosure_id, envelope_id: i.json.envelope_id, signing_url: i.json.signing_url }; });
return { json: { ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', sent: sent, count: sent.length } };
